channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Suikoden Live broadcast set for July 1
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Smartphone

The latest information on Suikoden STAR LEAP.

Konami will host a Suikoden Live broadcast on July 1 at 4:00 a.m. PT / 7:00 a.m. ET / 20:00 JST, the company announced. You will be able to watch it on YouTube.

The broadcast, which will run for approximately one hour, will feature the latest information on Suikoden STAR LEAP with voice actor guests Mikoi Sasaki, Aimi, and Ayasa Itou.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/suikoden-live-broadcast-set-for-july-1
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Persona 3 Reload shipments and digital sales top three million
item.content:encoded:
Total shipments and digital sales for Persona 3 Reload have surpassed three million units worldwide, ATLUS announced.

Persona 3 Reload launched for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store on February 2, 2024, followed by Switch 2 on October 23, 2025.

Here is an overview of the game, via ATLUS:

About

Step into the shoes of a transfer student thrust into an unexpected fate when entering the hour “hidden” between one day and the next. Awaken an incredible power and chase the mysteries of the Dark Hour, fight for your friends, and leave a mark on their memories forever.

Persona 3 Reload is a captivating reimagining of the genre-defining RPG, reborn for the modern era.

Key Features

  • Experience the pivotal game of the Persona series faithfully remade with cutting-edge graphics, modernized quality-of-life features, and signature stylish user interface.
  • Fully immerse yourself in an emotional, gripping journey with new scenes, character interactions, and additional voiceover.
  • Choose how to meaningfully spend each day through various activities from exploring the Port Island to forging genuine bonds with beloved characters.
  • Build and command your optimal team to take down otherworldly Shadows and climb closer to the truth.


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/persona-3-reload-shipments-and-digital-sales-top-three-million
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Silver Palace ‘Dichotomy’ beta test announced
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Sign-ups now available.

Publisher Elementa and developer Silver Studio have opened sign-ups for the “Dichotomy” beta test for fantasy adventure open-world action RPG Silver Palace, the companies announced. It will be playable on PC.

Here is an overview of the test, via Elementa:

■ “Dichotomy” Beta Test Recruitment

The echoes of nightmares have yet to fade, yet the light of dawn has already traced its way up the windowpane.
Follow the trail of truth through a maze of mysteries and seek a path to survival amid looming peril. A detective’s finest hour begins as the curtain rises.

How to Gain Access

  1. Recruitment Survey
    • Click “Beta Sign-Up” on the official Silver Palace site homepage, and fill out the recruitment survey for a chance to join our tester group.
    • Official Site: surveys.elementagames.com
    • We will contact all who successfully qualify for the “Dichotomy” Beta Test via email. Please keep an eye on your inbox.
    • Once “Dichotomy” Beta Test qualifications have been sent out, proceed to our official site and click “Check Test Access” to review your eligibility. Please refer to this in confirming your qualification status.
    • We will confirm the time at which “Dichotomy” Beta Test qualifications will be announced at a later date.
  2. Other Ways to Qualify
    • Follow our official Silver Palace social media pages for all the latest updates, and join in on our events to earn a chance to become a tester.
    • Those who have already qualified for the “Dichotomy” Beta Test via the “Monotype” Beta Test survey may head to the official site and click “Check Test Access” button to confirm.

Recruitment Period

  • From now until July 16, 2026 at 23:59 (UTC+8).

Beta Test Details

  • Type: Small-scale beta with a data wipe and no in-game purchases.
  • Platform: PC (Windows)

Recruitment Overview

  1. This test is only open to participants aged 18 and older.
  2. All versions of the game available during this beta test are under development, and not representative of the final release.
  3. “Dichotomy” Beta Test access will be bound to the device used for your first login. Logging in with a different device following this will result in an account ban, and revoke your testing privileges.
  4. Your eligibility applies to this beta only, and cannot be carried over to future tests. Transferring or selling the test client or test account is strictly prohibited. If found to have done so, your testing privileges will be immediately revoked. Please remain vigilant against any misleading information regarding account sharing/trading or test client sales. Keep your personal account information safe to avoid unnecessary losses.

■ “Dichotomy” Beta Test FAQ

Dear Detective, we have compiled a list of commonly seen questions about the “Dichotomy” Beta Test recruitment and the answers to them. We hope this will come in handy.

How can I get access to the test?

This test is only open to participants aged 18 and older.

  • Sign-Up Survey – Click “Beta Sign-Up” on the official Silver Palace site homepage, and fill out the recruitment survey for a chance to join our tester group.
  • Other Ways to Gain Access – Follow our official Silver Palace social media pages for all the latest updates, and join in on our events to earn a chance to become a tester.

What is the recruitment period for this beta test?

From now until July 16, 2026 at 23:59 (UTC+8).

What type of test is this?

The “Dichotomy” Beta Test will be a small-scale beta with a data wipe and no in-game purchases.

All versions of the game available during this beta test are under development, and not representative of the final release.

What devices are supported in this test? What are the device requirements for this test?

This test will support PC (Windows) devices exclusively. To ensure smooth installation and gameplay, the mininum and recommended system specifications are as follows:

  • Operating System
    • Windows 10 22H2 or Windows 11 21H2 or higher
  • CPU
    • Recommended: Intel Core i7-12700/AMD Ryzen 7 5800X or equivalent and above
    • Minimum: Intel Core i7-8700/AMD Ryzen 5 3600 or equivalent
  • Graphics Card (GPU)
    • Recommended: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3060/AMD Radeon RX 6600 XT or equivalent and above
    • Minimum: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 6 GB/AMD Radeon RX 580 8 GB or equivalent
  • Video Memory (VRAM)
    • Recommended: 8 GB or higher
    • Minimum: 6 GB
  • RAM (System Memory)
    • Recommended: 16 GB or higher
    • Minimum: 12 GB
  • Storage Space
    • 65 GB of available SSD space (an additional 25 GB of storage space is required during extraction)

We will continue to optimize game performance, stability, and graphics. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

How will I know whether I have been granted test access?

We will contact all who successfully qualify for the “Dichotomy” Beta Test via email. Please keep an eye on your inbox.

Once “Dichotomy” Beta Test qualifications have been sent out, proceed to our official site and click “Check Test Access” to review your eligibility. Please refer to this in confirming your qualification status.

We will confirm the time at which “Dichotomy” Beta Test qualifications will be announced at a later date.

Those who have already qualified for the “Dichotomy” Beta Test via the “Monotype” Beta Test survey may head to the official site and click “Check Test Access” button to confirm.

I’ve qualified for the test. Can I switch devices during the test?

“Dichotomy” Beta Test access will be bound to the device used for your first login. Logging in with a different device will result in an account ban and disqualification from further participation in the test.

I’ve qualified for the test, but don’t have time to participate. Can I use it in the next test or transfer it to someone else?

Your eligibility applies to this beta only, and cannot be carried over to future tests.

Transferring or selling the test client or test account is strictly prohibited. If found to have done so, your testing privileges will be immediately revoked.

Please remain vigilant against any misleading information regarding account sharing/trading or test client sales. Keep your personal account information safe to avoid unnecessary losses.

If the above information does not answer my question, how can I make further inquiries?

Please send us your questions via email here:  [email protected]

Silver Palace will be available for console, PC, iOS, and Android. A release date has yet to be announced. Read more about the game here.

Watch a new trailer below.

Dichotomy Beta Test Trailer: Black Knights’ Tango

English

Japanese

Korean

Traditional Chinese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/silver-palace-dichotomy-beta-test-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Dragon’s Dogma II: Dark Arisen details new features
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Dragon's Dogma II update to add extra save slots and more in August.

Capcom has released new information and screenshots for Dragon’s Dogma II: Dark Arisen during today’s Capcom Spotlight, including plans or a new Dragon’s Dogma II update due out in late August to improve performance, add extra save slots, and more.

Here are the details:

Dragon’s Dogma II: Dark Arisen and Dragon’s Dogma: Dark Arisen director Kento Kinoshita also joined today’s Capcom Spotlight to share how the highly anticipated expansion to Dragon’s Dogma II introduces rewarding gameplay options and more adventures for Arisen to encounter. Following the June Title Update, Dragon’s Dogma II will also receive an additional update in late August to improve performance across all platforms, add additional save slots, adjust the Dragonsplague condition, and increase weapon skill slots from four to six.

Dragon’s Dogma II: Dark Arisen features a brand-new story set in the long-abandoned northern region of Norgan, while also introducing 12 challenge dungeons for Arisen to hone their skills along with new hair and tattoo options for players to realize their vision for the Arisen and their main Pawn. Kinoshita explained the Relic Expedition Cycle players will experience as they explore the frigid region of Norgan, where they will discover relics, appraise them to unlock powerful new weapons and skills, and use those new tools to delve deeper into the secrets of the heartless Fallen Dragon and its pursuer Eir.

Dragon’s Dogma II: Dark Arisen releases on October 9, 2026 for MSRP $49.99. The “Dark Arisen” expansion will also be available separately as downloadable content for the base game on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Steam for MSRP $29.99. The “Norgan Fashion Set – Northern Attire” will be available as a pre-order bonus, which can be accessed via in-game storage at launch. Players who pre-order Dragon’s Dogma II: Dark Arisen on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Steam will also get immediate access to Dragon’s Dogma II prior to the release of the expansion.

Dragon’s Dogma II: Dark Arisen is due out for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam on October 9. The “Dark Arisen” expansion will also be available as downloadable content for the existing PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC versions of Dragon’s Dogma II.

View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Trailer

English

Japanese

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/dragons-dogma-ii-dark-arisen-details-new-features
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection DLC ‘Additional Side Story: Rudy’ now available alongside ‘Royal Monsters’ update
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

The legendary Felyne Navirou returns.

Capcom has released Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection downloadable content “Additional Side Story: Rudy” for $9.99, as well as the free “Royal Monsters” update, the company announced.

Here are the latest details, via Capcom:

Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection producer Ryozo Tsujimoto kicked off the show by unveiling the new downloadable content “Additional Side Story: Rudy,” which dives into the origins of the Royal Felyne and his ancestors who came long before him. In this downloadable content side story, Rudy stumbles into a strange situation that unexpectedly brings him face-to-face with Navirou, the legendary Felyne who once saved the world in Monster Hunter Stories.

“Additional Side Story: Rudy” is available now for $9.99. Players who have the Deluxe and Premium Deluxe Editions of Monster Hunter Stories 3 already have access to the DLC and can dive in later today!

During Rudy and Navirou’s fur-midable adventures, fans can look forward to encountering Nergigante, but the powerful Elder Dragon is not the only challenging monster that Monster Hunter Stories 3 fans will face. A free update for the acclaimed RPG is launching alongside the downloadable content “Additional Side Story: Rudy,” which brings Royal Monsters to the field! This update adds a higher level of difficulty to the Final Battle for players with completed save files. Clearing the Final Battle on Hard unlocks Royal Monster versions of almost every creature in the game, including Invasive Monsters and Calamitous Elder Dragons, for Rangers seeking an added challenge.

Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

DLC “Additional Side Story: Rudy” Trailer

English

Japanese

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/monster-hunter-stories-3-twisted-reflection-dlc-additional-side-story-rudy-now-available-alongside-royal-monsters-update

item.title: Onimusha: Way of the Sword ‘Game Overview’ trailer, screenshots
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox

First look at Dohatsu-ten.

Capcom has released a five-minute “Game Overview” trailer and new screenshots for swordplay action game Onimusha: Way of the Sword.

Here are the latest details, via Capcom:

Onimusha: Way of the Sword slashed its way into the show with director Satoru Nihei revealing a fearsome new foe players will duel in the highly anticipated swordplay action game when it launches.

The footage provides a first look at Dohatsu-ten, a terrifyingly fast and bloodthirsty Genma. After carving its way into the mortal realm, this winged warrior from the depths of hell locks blades with protagonist Miyamoto Musashi in an intense boss battle.

Pre-orders for Onimusha: Way of the Sword are available now and include the “Sealed Curse” sword skin and “Lion Dog” charm as bonuses. Players can also experience the game’s satisfying action today by downloading the Onimusha: Way of the Sword demo now.

Onimusha: Way of the Sword is due out for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, and Microsoft Store on September 25. A demo is available now for all platforms except Switch 2.

Watch a new trailer below. View the screenshots at the gallery.

Game Overview Trailer

English

Japanese

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/onimusha-way-of-the-sword-game-overview-trailer-screenshots
